name: Cranberry Crumble Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle almonds over the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream the sugar, butter and vanilla; beat on medium for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each.
4. Combine dry ingredients; add to batter alternately with sour cream. Mix well.
5. Spread 3 cups of batter over almonds.
6. Spoon cranberry sauce over the batter.
7. Top with remaining batter.
8. For topping, combine flour, sugar, almonds and vanilla; cut in butter until crumbly. Sprinkle over batter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 70-75 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes; remove sides of pan. Serve warm.
